sourceOverview.notes: Seed 1.8 LLM. TTS: Seed-TTS. STT: available via Volcano Engine. Primarily Chinese market.

audit.priceRangeSummary: Pricing varies across Doubao/Voice Tech product lines; official calculators are service-specific.
audit.limitsSummary: Volcano Engine splits capability across LLM, voice-tech, and realtime speech APIs. Exact model IDs are less uniform than western API catalogs.
audit.regionSummary: Primarily China/Asia infrastructure; exact region availability varies by Volcano Engine product.
audit.ttsLanguagesSummary: Broad speech/TTS offering, especially for Chinese; multilingual availability exists but is product-specific.
audit.sttLanguagesSummary: ASR available via Volcano Engine, including streaming and integrated end-to-end voice modes.
audit.freeTierSummary: Trial quotas sometimes available; depends on account/program.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Technically a full stack provider, but integration is fragmented across product surfaces. Plan for extra onboarding effort.

supplementalResearch.title: 19. ByteDance Doubao/Seed (China) — LLM ✓ TTS ⚠️ STT ⚠️
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 19. ByteDance Doubao/Seed (China) — LLM ✓ TTS ⚠️ STT ⚠️

**Status:** Active. Seed 2.0 Pro benchmarks near GPT-5.2 at 3.7× cheaper.

`seed-2-0-pro` (~$0.47/$2.37), `seed-2-0-mini` (cheapest). TTS via Volcano Engine (8 languages, Chinese-focused). **International access: enterprise-only via BytePlus.** Volcengine requires Chinese phone. Not practical for BYOK.
